420 M4G M4G_SURG_WOUND (M4G) Surgical Wounds CHAR 1 Skin condition: other skin problems or lesions present in last 7 days - surgical wounds. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
421 M4H M4H_NONE_ABOVE (M4H) None of Above Skin Problems CHAR 1 Skin condition: other skin problems or lesions present in last 7 days - none of above. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown.
